'''âv-d-g''' ('''kavadag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codetermine|codetermine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codetermine|codetermine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-d-g
|-
! Lemma
| kavadag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadag|thivadag]] || [[word:jivadag|jivadag]] || [[word:shivadag|shivadag]] || [[word:kivadag|kivadag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadag|thuthuvadag]] || [[word:jujuvadag|jujuvadag]] || [[word:shushuvadag|shushuvadag]] || [[word:kukuvadag|kukuvadag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvadag|thuvadag]] || [[word:juvadag|juvadag]] || [[word:shuvadag|shuvadag]] || [[word:kuvadag|kuvadag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvadag|thuvadag]] || [[word:juvadag|juvadag]] || [[word:shuvadag|shuvadag]] || [[word:kuvadag|kuvadag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevadag|thevadag]] || [[word:jevadag|jevadag]] || [[word:shevadag|shevadag]] || [[word:kevadag|kevadag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovadag|thothovadag]] || [[word:jojovadag|jojovadag]] || [[word:shoshovadag|shoshovadag]] || [[word:kokovadag|kokovadag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovadag|thovadag]] || [[word:jovadag|jovadag]] || [[word:shovadag|shovadag]] || [[word:kovadag|kovadag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovadag|thovadag]] || [[word:jovadag|jovadag]] || [[word:shovadag|shovadag]] || [[word:kovadag|kovadag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvadag|thĂŠvadag]] || [[word:jĂŠvadag|jĂŠvadag]] || [[word:shĂŠvadag|shĂŠvadag]] || [[word:kĂŠvadag|kĂŠvadag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavadag|thathavadag]] || [[word:jajavadag|jajavadag]] || [[word:shashavadag|shashavadag]] || [[word:kakavadag|kakavadag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavadag|thavadag]] || [[word:javadag|javadag]] || [[word:shavadag|shavadag]] || [[word:kavadag|kavadag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavadag|thavadag]] || [[word:javadag|javadag]] || [[word:shavadag|shavadag]] || [[word:kavadag|kavadag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavadag|shavadag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavadag|goshavadag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavadag|gokishavadag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavadagnĂŒ|shavadagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavadagnknĂŒ|goshavadagnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadagnĂŒ|gokishavadagnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavadagshĂ«|shavadagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavadagnkshĂ«|goshavadagnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavadagshĂ«|gokishavadagshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadagro|shavadagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadagnkro|goshavadagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadagro|gokishavadagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadagmu|shavadagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadagnkmu|goshavadagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadagmu|gokishavadagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavadagsher|shavadagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavadagnksher|goshavadagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavadagsher|gokishavadagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavadagng|shavadagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavadagnkng|goshavadagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavadagng|gokishavadagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavadagya|shavadagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavadagnkya|goshavadagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavadagya|gokishavadagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavadagyam|shavadagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavadagnkyam|goshavadagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavadagyam|gokishavadagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadagnĂŒshĂ«|shavadagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadagnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavadagnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadagnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavadagnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadagnĂŒro|shavadagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadagnknĂŒro|goshavadagnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadagnĂŒro|gokishavadagnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadagnĂŒmu|shavadagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadagnknĂŒmu|goshavadagnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadagnĂŒmu|gokishavadagnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadagshĂ«nĂŒ|shavadagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadagnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavadagnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadagshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavadagshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadagshĂ«ro|shavadagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadagnkshĂ«ro|goshavadagnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadagshĂ«ro|gokishavadagshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadagshĂ«mu|shavadagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadagnkshĂ«mu|goshavadagnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadagshĂ«mu|gokishavadagshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadagronĂŒ|shavadagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadagnkronĂŒ|goshavadagnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadagronĂŒ|gokishavadagronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadagroshĂ«|shavadagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadagnkroshĂ«|goshavadagnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadagroshĂ«|gokishavadagroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavadagromu|shavadagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavadagnkromu|goshavadagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavadagromu|gokishavadagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavadagmunĂŒ|shavadagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavadagnkmunĂŒ|goshavadagnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavadagmunĂŒ|gokishavadagmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavadagmushĂ«|shavadagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavadagnkmushĂ«|goshavadagnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavadagmushĂ«|gokishavadagmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavadagmuro|shavadagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavadagnkmuro|goshavadagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavadagmuro|gokishavadagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
